pi_items.source: Cross-referenced with NASDAQ/Yahoo Finance - Apple Inc. is a real, liquid stock traded under ticker AAPL
Cross-referenced with NASDAQ/Yahoo Finance - SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust is a real, liquid ETF traded under ticker SPY (oldest US ETF, created 1993)
NinjaTrader 8 official documentation confirms Bollinger Bands is a standard system indicator with configurable Period and NumStdDev (Standard Deviation) parameters
NinjaTrader 8 official documentation confirms RSI is a standard system indicator with default Period=14 (task specifies Period 14)
NinjaTrader 8 official documentation confirms standard workspace directory structure. Path is correct with 'Docker' as the Windows username on this system
File path matches what verifier.py expects to read (line 38 of verifier.py). Directory structure confirmed in setup_ninjatrader.ps1 (creates C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks)

Evidence documented in /evidence_docs/README.md states 'Yahoo Finance data imports correctly in NinjaTrader semicolon format'. Data files verified: 502 records each (standard trading days), format yyyyMMdd;open;high;low;close;volume matches NinjaTrader import format. Price ranges verified: AAPL Oct-Dec 2024 ~$220-$260 (confirmed by Oct 2024 entries at $250s range)

Data files exist: AAPL.Last.txt, MSFT.Last.txt, SPY.Last.txt. All are real, highly liquid instruments: SPY (most widely traded ETF globally), AAPL (largest market cap company), MSFT (major tech stock)

pi_items.metadata_value: Linking windows via same link color
pi_items.verified_value: NinjaTrader 8 instrument link feature allows linking charts by color
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 official documentation and forum posts confirm: Charts can be linked using colored buttons in toolbar. When linked with same color, changing instrument on one chart automatically updates all linked charts to that instrument. This enables synchronized trading.

pi_items.verified_value: Period 20, StdDev 2 are valid NinjaTrader 8 Bollinger Bands parameters
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 official documentation confirms these parameters are user-configurable. Standard defaults are Period=14, NumStdDev=2. Task specifies Period=20 (custom) and StdDev=2 (standard)

pi_items.verified_value: Period 14 is the standard NinjaTrader 8 RSI default parameter
pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 official documentation confirms RSI includes two inputs: Period (default 14) and Smooth (default 3). Task correctly specifies Period 14

privileged_info_summary: The task uses NinjaTrader 8, a real trading platform, with real historical data from Yahoo Finance (502 daily bars covering 2023-2024) for three actual securities: SPY (most-traded S&P 500 ETF), AAPL (Apple Inc.), and MSFT (Microsoft). The task requires creating two daily charts, adding standard technical indicators (Bollinger Bands with Period 20 and StdDev 2 to chart 1, RSI Period 14 to chart 2), linking them using NinjaTrader 8's built-in instrument link feature via matching color buttons, and verifying synchronization by switching the instrument from SPY to AAPL. All metadata claims are technically accurate and correspond to real NinjaTrader 8 features, real financial instruments, and authentic historical market data.
